description: CompositionBlack sleeveless sweater made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline, armholes and hemline, and embroidered logo on the left chestFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureCool ironDo not dry cleanA perfect way to welcome chilly weather, this vest from puma is designed for those who love style and comfort. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish vest which can be layered over shirts and tees, while the fabric keeps you warm and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and black footwear.  Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
